query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS third_party_vehicles (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  claim_id INT NOT NULL,
  make VARCHAR(100),
  model VARCHAR(100),
  year INT,
  registration VARCHAR(50),
  vin VARCHAR(17),
  color VARCHAR(50),
  owner_name VARCHAR(200),
  owner_contact VARCHAR(100),
  owner_address TEXT,
  driver_name VARCHAR(200),
  driver_license VARCHAR(100),
  insurance_company VARCHAR(200),
  policy_number VARCHAR(100),
  damage_description TEXT,
  damage_photos TEXT,
  estimated_repair_cost INT,
  market_value INT,
  market_value_source VARCHAR(255),
  market_value_confidence ENUM('low', 'medium', 'high'),
  liability_percentage INT DEFAULT 0,
  compensation_amount INT,
  compensation_type ENUM('repair', 'cash', 'total_loss'),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

  owner_address TEXT,
  driver_name VARCHAR(200),
  driver_license VARCHAR(100),
  insurance_company VARCHAR(200),
  policy_number VARCHAR(100),
  damage_description TEXT,
  damage_photos TEXT,
  estimated_repair_cost INT,
  market_value INT,
  market_value_source VARCHAR(255),
  market_value_confidence ENUM('low', 'medium', 'high'),
  liability_percentage INT DEFAULT 0,
  compensation_amount INT,
  compensation_type ENUM('repair', 'cash', 'total_loss'),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
